title: sticherus hirtus
intro: Sticherus hirtus, also known as the Hairy Rasp Fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sticherus hirtus include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Sticherus hirtus typically involve infusions, decoctions, or extracts of the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical creams for medicinal purposes.
